subcodes.first_line: The Book from before the Wronged One unto those whom vain imaginings have not debarred from the Lord of all beings, Who hath manifested the Dayspring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذین مامنعتهم الاوهام عن مالک الانام الذی اظهر مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
